case_title: ANDREA RAMIREZ VS. NADINE BURKE HARRIS

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER CONTINUED TO APRIL 2, 2021 AT 3:30 P.M DEPT. 506. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,586.38 FILED BY RAMIREZ, ANDREA AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, NADINE BURKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - UNDELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, NADINE BURKE
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-26-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-08-2020 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ANDREA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-02-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANDREA RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NADINE BURKE HARRIS IS PRESENT. ARNO HARRIS, HUSBAND, TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. COURT ADDRESS WITH PLAINTIFF THE ISSUE OF STATUTE OF LIMITATION. COURT EXPRESSES THAT DAMAGES/COST INCURRED BEFORE JUNE 4, 2018 CANNOT BE CONSIDERED. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS HAD EXPIRED ON ALL CLAIMS PRIOR TO JUNE 4, 2018. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. PARTIES AGREE TO A SETTLEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2000.00. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED AND THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE, AN APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ANDREA AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, NADINE BURKE

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $152.50 SERVED JAN-29-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, NADINE BURKE
